description_long: This cafe features a compact, rectangular building with a flat roof, topped by a large, stylized coffee cup as a prominent decorative element. The front facade displays large windows and a central door, flanked by a menu board and the word 'Coffee' in bold, three-dimensional letters above the entrance. A striped yellow-and-gray awning extends over an outdoor seating area, which includes a hexagonal table and several chairs. The side and rear walls are plain, with the outdoor seating and awning only visible from the front and one side. The overall design is modern and playful, with clean lines and simple geometric shapes. The materials appear to be a mix of painted concrete or plaster, glass for the windows, and metal or plastic for the signage and furniture.
description: A modern cafe building with a large coffee cup on the roof, bold 'Coffee' signage, big windows, and a striped awning shading an outdoor seating area.
description_view_0: The side view shows the plain wall of the cafe, the large coffee cup on the roof, and a glimpse of the menu board and awning edge.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the 'Coffee' sign, large windows, central door, menu board, striped awning, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: The rear view focuses on the awning and outdoor seating, with the coffee cup and signage visible from behind.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the plain wall, the back of the awning, and the outdoor seating area, with the coffee cup handle visible.
